title: PS-66772: Solved issue Custom View - User-added field for the custom List view is not saved.
body: The actual issue was that the column used for grouping was being hidden as a column. This approach deletes the code lines that were causing the column to be hidden.
author: AbrahamSLT

review_comments.body: This is not a valid fix. If the explanation for the bug is that the group column is not in the list, then that is the response to the bug: it is working as intended.
review_comments.author: kcostenbader
